text:
The Unicorn Tribe (, Ikkaku-zoku) is a tribe whose members have a single horn protruding from their forehead. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Overview

Their skulls are items sought by flesh collectors such as Neon Nostrade. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Baise retrieves a Unicorn Tribesman Skull in order to qualify for the Nostrade Family bodyguard position. 

References
